comments: Reviewed tasks/v0.8-m3-result-review-packet.json, tasks/v0.8-m3-execution-contract.json, tasks/v0.8-m3-execution-result.json, and git show --stat --name-only / patch for commit 2d367e3. The commit adds exactly 17 YAML workflows under templates/workflows/: architect, assist, comprehensive-pr-review, create-issue, feature-development, fix-github-issue, idea-to-pr, issue-review-full, piv-loop, plan-to-pr, ralph-dag, refactor-safely, remotion-generate, resolve-conflicts, smart-pr-review, test-loop-dag, and validate-pr, matching the contract/result artifact with no missing or extra workflow templates. The only non-workflow files added are tasks/v0.8-m3-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.8-m3-result-review-packet.json, which are the allowed_artifacts. No files or diff hunks indicate implementation of a Node.js/TypeScript DAG execution runner, no review automation daemon logic, no legacy tooling removal, and no modifications to workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics. Commit scope is limited to allowed implementation and artifact files, so the result is approved.
